cards.title: Does Parenthood Make Your Brain Smarter?
cards.body: Recent studies show mothers and fathers have healthier, younger-looking brains than non-parents. Years of mental and emotional gymnastics from raising children may boost cognitive function.

cards.title: Managing Anxiety on Family Holidays
cards.body: Excessive worry can rob parents of vacation enjoyment while children relax. When real emergencies happen, worried parents often discover they're more resilient than they thought.

cards.title: Breaking Cycles From Dysfunctional Childhoods
cards.body: Children of narcissistic or avoidant parents often struggle to form healthy relationships as adults. Understanding what healthy relationships look like takes time and sometimes professional help.

cards.title: When Adult Children Distance From Parents
cards.body: Adult children can feel conflicted about maintaining close contact with parents. Finding healthy boundaries requires honest reflection about what feels authentic.

cards.title: When Teens Are Labeled 'Not Paying Attention'
cards.body: Repeated criticism about attention span can cause teens to internalize negative self-labels. These beliefs can have lasting impacts on self-esteem and academic confidence.

cards.title: Five Common Autism Misdiagnoses in Children
cards.body: Many children are misdiagnosed with other conditions before autism is identified. Understanding the differences helps families and clinicians provide appropriate support.

cards.title: Supporting LGBTQ Youth in Crisis
cards.body: LGBTQ young people face elevated suicide risk and need accessible mental health support. Crisis resources must be equipped to serve this vulnerable population effectively.

cards.title: School Isolation Policies Raise Child Welfare Concerns
cards.body: A Yorkshire school placed a pupil in isolation for more than half a school year. Zero-tolerance behavior policies are drawing scrutiny for their impact on student wellbeing.

cards.title: Healthy Prenup Conversations for Couples
cards.body: Prenuptial agreements can strengthen relationships when discussed thoughtfully and respectfully. Communication approach matters more than the agreement itself for long-term relationship health.

cards.title: Tragedy Affects Professional Athletes' Performance
cards.body: Liverpool's Cody Gakpo scored days after losing his unborn son during World Cup competition. Athletes often channel grief into their performance while processing profound loss.
